sentences.arabic: فَرَضَ التَّحَوُّلُ الرَّقْمِيُّ نَمَطًا جَدِيدًا لِلْعَمَلِ عَنْ بُعْدٍ، مِمَّا أَتَاحَ لِلْمُوَظَّفِينَ مَبْدَأَ الْمُرُونَةِ فِي الزَّمَانِ وَالْمَكَانِ.
sentences.translation: Digitalna transformacija nametnula je novi obrazac rada na daljinu, što je zaposlenima omogućilo princip fleksibilnosti u vremenu i prostoru.
sentences.translationEn: Digital transformation has imposed a new pattern of remote work, allowing employees the principle of flexibility in time and place.

sentences.arabic: عَلَى الرَّغْمِ مِنْ مَزَايَا هَذَا النَّظَامِ، إِلَّا أَنَّهُ يَحْتَاجُ إِلَى انْضِبَاطٍ ذَاتِيٍّ عَالٍ لِتَجَنُّبِ التَّشْتِيتِ وَالْكَسَلِ.
sentences.translation: Uprkos prednostima ovog sistema, on zahtijeva visoku samodisciplinu kako bi se izbjeglo ometanje i lijenost.
sentences.translationEn: Despite the advantages of this system, it requires high self-discipline to avoid distraction and laziness.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاهِمُ الْأَدَوَاتُ التِّقْنِيَّةُ الْحَدِيثَةُ فِي تَيْسِيرِ التَّوَاصُلِ الِافْتِرَاضِيِّ بَيْنَ الزُّمَلَاءِ وَإِدَارَةِ الْمَهَامِّ بِكُلِّ سُهُولَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Moderni tehnički alati doprinose olakšavanju virtuelne komunikacije među kolegama i upravljanju zadacima s potpunom lakoćom.
sentences.translationEn: Modern technical tools contribute to facilitating virtual communication between colleagues and managing tasks with ease.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمَرْءِ خَلْقُ مَسَاحَةِ عَمَلٍ هَادِئَةٍ فِي الْمَنْزِلِ لِتَعْزِيزِ التَّرْكِيزِ وَالْحِفَاظِ عَلَى مَسْتَوَى الْإِنْتَاجِيَّةِ الْمَطْلُوبِ.
sentences.translation: Čovjek mora kreirati miran radni prostor kod kuće kako bi podstakao fokus i održao potreban nivo produktivnosti.
sentences.translationEn: One must create a quiet workspace at home to enhance focus and maintain the required level of productivity.

sentences.arabic: تُشِيرُ التَّوَقُّعَاتُ إِلَى أَنَّ الْعَمَلَ الْهَجِينَ سَيَكُونُ النَّمُوذَجَ السَّائِدَ فِي الْمُسْتَقْبَلِ لِمَا يُوَفِّرُهُ مِنْ رَاحَةٍ وَكَفَاءَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Predviđanja ukazuju na to da će hibridni rad biti dominantan model u budućnosti zbog udobnosti i efikasnosti koju pruža.
sentences.translationEn: Expectations indicate that hybrid work will be the dominant model in the future due to the comfort and efficiency it provides.
